hero.title: Your Path to Property Ownership Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Fast pre-approval, competitive rates, and dedicated loan officers who guide you through every step of real estate financing.

fast.title: Fast Pre-Approval
fast.description: Get pre-approved in as little as 24 hours. Our streamlined process means less waiting and more house hunting.

rates.title: Competitive Rates
rates.description: Access institutional-grade rates typically reserved for large borrowers. We pass the savings to you.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Your personal loan officer is available by phone, email, or chat throughout the entire process.

form.title: Start Your Application
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and a loan officer will contact you within one business day.

step1.title: Property Details
step1.description: Tell us about the property you're interested in.

step2.title: Personal Information
step2.description: We need to know who you are.
step2.name: Full Name

step3.title: Employment & Income
step3.description: Help us understand your financial situation.

step4.title: Review
step4.description: Please review your information before submitting.
step4.name: Full Name

step5.title: Confirmation
step5.successMessage: Thank you for your application. A loan officer will review your information and contact you within one business day.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

footer.tagline: Professional real estate financing solutions since 2005.
